creator: mikael@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have successfully build xorg-server on my raspberry-pi with the patches attached (also available at [1] and [2]). You have to put them in x11-servers/xorg-server/files
The patches are from Aleksandr Rybalko (https://github.com/rayddteam/x11-servers-xorg-server)

A screenshot is available at [3]

[1] http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/Raspberry-Pi/patch-Xserver-hw-xfree86-os-support-bsd-Makefile.in
[2] http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/Raspberry-Pi/patch-servermd.h
[3] http://mikael.urankar.free.fr/FreeBSD/Raspberry-Pi/xorg_raspberry-pi.png
